query: Please stash my local changes, switch to another branch, and bring me back later without losing anything.
I need to inspect reflog history and figure out how to recover a branch tip I moved by mistake.
Set up a worktree for a hotfix branch while keeping my current feature branch untouched.
Draft a CONTRIBUTING.md section that explains our pull request etiquette.
Write a tutorial explaining the history of Git and why Linus Torvalds created it.
Build a dashboard that charts commit frequency by author over time.
